Arotel Rooms & Suites Website - Project Summary
Objective

Build a modern, fast, luxury hotel website for Arotel Rooms & Suites using Next.js + React in VS Code. The website should be AI-generated section by section, fully responsive, SEO-friendly, and deployed for free on Cloudflare.

Tech Stack
Next.js (App Router)
React
Tailwind CSS
JavaScript
VS Code
Git & GitHub
Cloudflare Workers (Hosting)
Existing domain: arotel.net
Development Steps


1. Install Requirements
Node.js (LTS)
VS Code
Git

Verify installation:

node -v
npm -v
git --version


2. Create the Project
npx create-next-app@latest arotel-website

Choose:

JavaScript
Tailwind CSS
ESLint
App Router
Turbopack
src directory


3. Open the Project
cd arotel-website
code .


4. Start Development Server
npm run dev

Open:

http://localhost:3000

Home
Rooms & Suites
Restaurant
Gallery
Amenities

Components

Navbar
Hero Section
Room Cards
Amenities
Gallery
Restaurant Section
Testimonials
FAQ
Footer
WhatsApp Floating Button
Booking Buttons


## Design Requirements
Luxury hotel look and feel
Warm color palette
Smooth animations
Mobile-first responsive design
Fast loading
Accessible
SEO optimized


## Features
High-quality image gallery
Google Maps integration
WhatsApp booking button
Booking.com & Airbnb links
Contact form
Room information
Restaurant information
Amenities
Swimming pool section
Reviews
FAQ


## Folder Structure
src/
│
├── app/
│   ├── page.js
│   ├── rooms/
│   ├── restaurant/
│   ├── gallery/
│   ├── contact/
│   └── about/
│
├── components/
├── assets/
└── styles/

public/
├── images/
└── videos/
AI Workflow

## For each section:

Generate one component or page.
Wait for my approval and Preview it with npm run dev and wait for my feedback.
Repeat until the website is complete.

This keeps development manageable and makes it easy to refine each section.

Future Enhancements

The website should be built so it can later upgraded and enhanced with new features.


Create a premium, professional hotel website for Arotel Rooms & Suites that is fast, modern, easy to maintain, and scalable for future features, while keeping development simple using VS Code, Next.js, React, GitHub, and Cloudflare.
